{{Quote|It is a good thing that you shoot faster than you run, little human. But please, do not ruin our sport. It shames a male to need rescue from a mud worg.|A [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]]|<ref name="Missions 8" />}}
The '''mud worgs''' were [[Species/Legends|creatures]] native to [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]].
